title: Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple
tagline: Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple is an ancient Lord Subhramanya temple near Pandalam in Pathanamthitta in Kerala, India.
overview.description: Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple is an ancient Lord Subhramanya temple near Pandalam in Pathanamthitta in Kerala, India. This temple has two Sreekovils (sanctum sanctorum). Both Sreekovils are round (vatta). It is an age old temple whispering several fascinating legends of the bygone eras.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Cathedral, Thumpamon
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Cathedral (Thumpamon Valiya Pally or തുമ്പമണ്‍ വലിയ പള്ളി or Marthamariyam Badrasana Devalayam) is an Orthodox ancient church located in Thumpamon near Pandalam, Kerala state of India.

image.alt: St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Cathedral, Thumpamon

topPlaces.name: Thumpamon
topPlaces.description: Thumpamon is a village in Pandalam (5 km Approx), a part of Adoor thaluk in Kerala, India. One of the greatest attractions of this village is the Achenkovil River, which is known for its natural sceneries along the riverbank.

topPlaces.name: Kadakkad
topPlaces.description: Kadakkad is a municipal division in Pandalam. Situated in the banks of Achankovil river; Kadakkad divided into two divisions, Kadakkad North and Kadakkad South.

topPlaces.name: Kadakkad Sree Bhadrakali Temple
topPlaces.description: Kadakkad Sree Bhadrakali Temple (Malayalam:കടയ്ക്കാട് ശ്രീ ഭദ്രകാളീക്ഷേത്രം) is a Hindu temple at Pandalam, India.It is located to the north of Kadakkad, by the Pathanamthitta MC Road. The temple complex also includes an anakkottil (platform for elephants during the rite Seva) and an office room.

topPlaces.name: Chenneerkara
topPlaces.description: Chenneerkara is a village in Pathanamthitta district in the state of Kerala, India. The majority of its inhabitants are from Hindu and Christian backgrounds.

topPlaces.name: Nariyapuram
topPlaces.description: Nariyapuram is a village in Vallicode Panchayat of Pathanamthitta district in Kerala, India. Nariyapuram is located in the northern part of Pathanamthitta.

topPlaces.name: Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathi Temple
topPlaces.description: Orippurathu Bhagavathy Temple (Malayalam: ഒരിപ്പുറത്തു ഭഗവതി ക്ഷേത്രം) is a 1200 year old ancient Hindu temple in Thattayil, near Adoor in Pathanamthitta in Kerala. It is one of the most famous Bhagavathi temples in Central Travancore.

topPlaces.name: Mathoor
topPlaces.description: Mathoor is a hamlet located near Omallur in the Pathanamthitta district of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (86 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thumpamon Vadakkumnatha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Cathedral, Thumpamon, Thumpamon, Kadakkad, Kadakkad Sree Bhadrakali Temple, Chenneerkara.
